questions: chatbot ar QA system ki same?
answers: Question Answering (QA) is an NLP task where a system reads a passage or knowledge base and answers questions about it. It can be extractive (finding answers in text) or generative (creating answers).
QA system holo ekta AI ja question er answer dite pare. Extractive QA text theke exact answer tule ane, ar generative QA nijei answer generate kore.
Modern QA systems use transformer models like BERT for extractive QA and GPT for generative QA. They power search engines, virtual assistants, and customer support chatbots.
Question answering systems range from simple FAQ bots to complex models that reason over multiple documents. RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) combines search with generation for accurate answers.
